name: Password Protected ZIP File Opened (Suspicious Filenames)
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Password Protected ZIP File Opened (Suspicious Filenames)
SIGMA Description: Detects the extraction of password protected ZIP archives with suspicious file names. See the filename variable for more details on which file has been opened.

False positives:
- Legitimate used of encrypted ZIP files

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5379 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%invoice%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new order%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rechnung%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%factura%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delivery%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%purchase%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%order%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%payment%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Password Protected ZIP File Opened (Suspicious Filenames) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5379 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft_windows_shell_zipfolder:filename%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%invoice%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new order%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rechnung%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%factura%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delivery%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%purchase%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%order%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%payment%') AQL filter query
